Functions.Name: Conv_FloatToString
Functions.Description: Converts a float value to a string

Functions.Name: Conv_IntToString
Functions.Description: Converts an integer value to a string

Functions.Name: Conv_Int64ToString
Functions.Description: Converts an integer64 value to a string

Functions.Name: Conv_UInt64ToString
Functions.Description: Converts an uinteger64 value to a string

Functions.Name: Conv_ByteToString
Functions.Description: Converts a byte value to a string

Functions.Name: Conv_BoolToString
Functions.Description: Converts a boolean value to a string, either 'true' or 'false'

Functions.Name: Conv_VectorToString
Functions.Description: Converts a vector value to a string, in the form 'X= Y= Z='

Functions.Name: Conv_IntVectorToString
Functions.Description: Converts an IntVector value to a string, in the form 'X= Y= Z='

Functions.Name: Conv_Vector2dToString
Functions.Description: Converts a vector2d value to a string, in the form 'X= Y='

Functions.Name: Conv_RotatorToString
Functions.Description: Converts a rotator value to a string, in the form 'P= Y= R='

Functions.Name: Conv_TransformToString
Functions.Description: Converts a transform value to a string, in the form 'Translation: X= Y= Z= Rotation: P= Y= R= Scale: X= Y= Z='

Functions.Name: Conv_ObjectToString
Functions.Description: Converts a UObject value to a string by calling the object's GetName method

Functions.Name: Conv_ColorToString
Functions.Description: Converts a linear color value to a string, in the form '(R=,G=,B=,A=)'

Functions.Name: Conv_DateTimeToString
Functions.Description: Converts a date time value to a string, in the form '%Y.%m.%d-%H.%M.%S'

Functions.Name: Conv_NameToString
Functions.Description: Converts a name value to a string

Functions.Name: Conv_StringToName
Functions.Description: Converts a string to a name value

Functions.Name: Conv_StringToInt
Functions.Description: Converts a string to a int value

Functions.Name: Conv_StringToInt64
Functions.Description: Converts a string to a int64 value

Functions.Name: Conv_StringToFloat
Functions.Description: Converts a string to a float value

Functions.Name: Conv_StringToVector
Functions.Description: Convert String Back To Vector. IsValid indicates whether or not the string could be successfully converted.

Functions.Name: Conv_StringToVector2D
Functions.Description: Convert String Back To Vector2D. IsValid indicates whether or not the string could be successfully converted.

Functions.Name: Conv_StringToRotator
Functions.Description: Convert String Back To Rotator. IsValid indicates whether or not the string could be successfully converted.

Functions.Name: Conv_StringToColor
Functions.Description: Convert String Back To Color. IsValid indicates whether or not the string could be successfully converted.

Functions.Name: BuildString_Float
Functions.Description: Converts a float->string, create a new string in the form AppendTo+Prefix+InFloat+Suffix

Params.Name: AppendTo
Params.Description: - An existing string to use as the start of the conversion string

Params.Name: Prefix
Params.Description: - A string to use as a prefix, after the AppendTo string

Params.Name: InFloat
Params.Description: - The float value to convert

Params.Name: Suffix
Params.Description: - A suffix to append to the end of the conversion string

Return.Description: A new string built from the passed parameters

Functions.Name: BuildString_Int
Functions.Description: Converts a int->string, creating a new string in the form AppendTo+Prefix+InInt+Suffix

Params.Name: AppendTo
Params.Description: - An existing string to use as the start of the conversion string

Params.Name: Prefix
Params.Description: - A string to use as a prefix, after the AppendTo string

Params.Name: InInt
Params.Description: - The int value to convert

Params.Name: Suffix
Params.Description: - A suffix to append to the end of the conversion string

Return.Description: A new string built from the passed parameters

Functions.Name: BuildString_Int64
Functions.Description: Converts a int->string, creating a new string in the form AppendTo+Prefix+InInt+Suffix

Params.Name: AppendTo
Params.Description: - An existing string to use as the start of the conversion string

Params.Name: Prefix
Params.Description: - A string to use as a prefix, after the AppendTo string

Params.Name: Suffix
Params.Description: - A suffix to append to the end of the conversion string

Return.Description: A new string built from the passed parameters

Functions.Name: BuildString_Bool
Functions.Description: Converts a boolean->string, creating a new string in the form AppendTo+Prefix+InBool+Suffix

Params.Name: AppendTo
Params.Description: - An existing string to use as the start of the conversion string

Params.Name: Prefix
Params.Description: - A string to use as a prefix, after the AppendTo string

Params.Name: InBool
Params.Description: - The bool value to convert. Will add "true" or "false" to the conversion string

Params.Name: Suffix
Params.Description: - A suffix to append to the end of the conversion string

Return.Description: A new string built from the passed parameters

Functions.Name: BuildString_Vector
Functions.Description: Converts a vector->string, creating a new string in the form AppendTo+Prefix+InVector+Suffix

Params.Name: AppendTo
Params.Description: - An existing string to use as the start of the conversion string

Params.Name: Prefix
Params.Description: - A string to use as a prefix, after the AppendTo string

Params.Name: InVector
Params.Description: - The vector value to convert. Uses the standard FVector::ToString conversion

Params.Name: Suffix
Params.Description: - A suffix to append to the end of the conversion string

Return.Description: A new string built from the passed parameters

Functions.Name: BuildString_IntVector
Functions.Description: Converts an IntVector->string, creating a new string in the form AppendTo+Prefix+InIntVector+Suffix

Params.Description: - An existing string to use as the start of the conversion string

Params.Name: Prefix
Params.Description: - A string to use as a prefix, after the AppendTo string

Params.Name: InIntVector
Params.Description: - The intVector value to convert. Uses the standard FVector::ToString conversion

Params.Name: Suffix
Params.Description: - A suffix to append to the end of the conversion string

Return.Description: A new string built from the passed parameters

Functions.Name: BuildString_Vector2d
Functions.Description: Converts a vector2d->string, creating a new string in the form AppendTo+Prefix+InVector2d+Suffix

Params.Description: - An existing string to use as the start of the conversion string

Params.Name: Prefix
Params.Description: - A string to use as a prefix, after the AppendTo string

Params.Name: InVector2d
Params.Description: - The vector2d value to convert. Uses the standard FVector2D::ToString conversion

Params.Name: Suffix
Params.Description: - A suffix to append to the end of the conversion string

Return.Description: A new string built from the passed parameters

Functions.Name: BuildString_Rotator
Functions.Description: Converts a rotator->string, creating a new string in the form AppendTo+Prefix+InRot+Suffix

Params.Name: AppendTo
Params.Description: - An existing string to use as the start of the conversion string

Params.Name: Prefix
Params.Description: - A string to use as a prefix, after the AppendTo string

Params.Name: InRot
Params.Description: - The rotator value to convert. Uses the standard ToString conversion

Params.Name: Suffix
Params.Description: - A suffix to append to the end of the conversion string

Return.Description: A new string built from the passed parameters

Functions.Name: BuildString_Object
Functions.Description: Converts a object->string, creating a new string in the form AppendTo+Prefix+object name+Suffix

Params.Name: AppendTo
Params.Description: - An existing string to use as the start of the conversion string

Params.Name: Prefix
Params.Description: - A string to use as a prefix, after the AppendTo string

Params.Name: InObj
Params.Description: - The object to convert. Will insert the name of the object into the conversion string

Params.Name: Suffix
Params.Description: - A suffix to append to the end of the conversion string

Return.Description: A new string built from the passed parameters

Functions.Name: BuildString_Color
Functions.Description: Converts a color->string, creating a new string in the form AppendTo+Prefix+InColor+Suffix

Params.Description: - An existing string to use as the start of the conversion string

Params.Name: Prefix
Params.Description: - A string to use as a prefix, after the AppendTo string

Params.Name: InColor
Params.Description: - The linear color value to convert. Uses the standard ToString conversion

Params.Name: Suffix
Params.Description: - A suffix to append to the end of the conversion string

Return.Description: A new string built from the passed parameters

Params.Name: InName
Params.Description: - The name value to convert

Params.Name: Suffix
Params.Description: - A suffix to append to the end of the conversion string

Functions.Name: Concat_StrStr
Functions.Description: Concatenates two strings together to make a new string

Params.Name: A
Params.Description: - The original string

Params.Name: B
Params.Description: - The string to append to A

Return.Description: A new string which is the concatenation of A+B

Functions.Name: EqualEqual_StrStr
Functions.Description: Test if the input strings are equal (A == B)

Params.Name: A
Params.Description: - The string to compare against

Params.Name: B
Params.Description: - The string to compare

Return.Description: True if the strings are equal, false otherwise

Functions.Name: EqualEqual_StriStri
Functions.Description: Test if the input strings are equal (A == B), ignoring case

Params.Name: A
Params.Description: - The string to compare against

Params.Name: B
Params.Description: - The string to compare

Return.Description: True if the strings are equal, false otherwise

Functions.Name: NotEqual_StrStr
Functions.Description: Test if the input string are not equal (A != B)

Params.Name: A
Params.Description: - The string to compare against

Params.Name: B
Params.Description: - The string to compare

Return.Description: Returns true if the input strings are not equal, false if they are equal

Functions.Name: NotEqual_StriStri
Functions.Description: Test if the input string are not equal (A != B), ignoring case differences

Params.Name: A
Params.Description: - The string to compare against

Params.Name: B
Params.Description: - The string to compare

Return.Description: Returns true if the input strings are not equal, false if they are equal

Functions.Name: Len
Functions.Description: Returns the number of characters in the string

Return.Description: The number of chars in the string

Functions.Name: GetSubstring
Functions.Description: Returns a substring from the string starting at the specified position

Params.Name: SourceString
Params.Description: - The string to get the substring from

Params.Name: StartIndex
Params.Description: - The location in SourceString to use as the start of the substring

Params.Name: Length
Params.Description: The length of the requested substring

Return.Description: The requested substring

Functions.Name: FindSubstring
Functions.Description: Finds the starting index of a substring in the a specified string

Params.Name: SearchIn
Params.Description: The string to search within

Params.Name: Substring
Params.Description: The string to look for in the SearchIn string

Params.Name: bUseCase
Params.Description: Whether or not to be case-sensitive

Params.Name: bSearchFromEnd
Params.Description: Whether or not to start the search from the end of the string instead of the beginning

Params.Name: StartPosition
Params.Description: The position to start the search from

Return.Description: The index (starting from 0 if bSearchFromEnd is false) of the first occurence of the substring

Functions.Name: Contains
Functions.Description: Returns whether this string contains the specified substring.

Return.Description: Returns whether the string contains the substring

Functions.Name: GetCharacterAsNumber
Functions.Description: Gets a single character from the string (as an integer)

Params.Name: SourceString
Params.Description: - The string to convert

Params.Name: Index
Params.Description: - Location of the character whose value is required

Return.Description: The integer value of the character or 0 if index is out of range

Functions.Name: ParseIntoArray
Functions.Description: Gets an array of strings from a source string divided up by a separator and empty strings can optionally be culled.

Params.Name: SourceString
Params.Description: - The string to chop up

Params.Name: Delimiter
Params.Description: - The string to delimit on

Params.Name: CullEmptyStrings
Params.Description: = true - Cull (true) empty strings or add them to the array (false)

Return.Description: The array of string that have been separated

Functions.Name: JoinStringArray
Functions.Description: Concatenates an array of strings into a single string.

Params.Name: SourceArray
Params.Description: - The array of strings to concatenate.

Params.Name: Separator
Params.Description: - The string used to separate each element.

Return.Description: The final, joined, separated string.

Functions.Name: GetCharacterArrayFromString
Functions.Description: Returns an array that contains one entry for each character in SourceString

Params.Name: SourceString
Params.Description: The string to break apart into characters

Return.Description: An array containing one entry for each character in SourceString

Functions.Name: ToUpper
Functions.Description: Returns a string converted to Upper case

Params.Name: SourceString
Params.Description: The string to convert

Return.Description: The string in upper case

Functions.Name: ToLower
Functions.Description: Returns a string converted to Lower case

Params.Name: SourceString
Params.Description: The string to convert

Return.Description: The string in lower case

Functions.Name: LeftPad
Functions.Description: Pad the left of this string for a specified number of characters

Params.Name: SourceString
Params.Description: The string to pad

Params.Name: ChCount
Params.Description: Amount of padding required

Return.Description: The padded string

Functions.Name: RightPad
Functions.Description: Pad the right of this string for a specified number of characters

Params.Name: SourceString
Params.Description: The string to pad

Params.Name: ChCount
Params.Description: Amount of padding required

Return.Description: The padded string

Functions.Name: IsNumeric
Functions.Description: Checks if a string contains only numeric characters

Params.Name: SourceString
Params.Description: The string to check

Return.Description: true if the string only contains numeric characters

Functions.Name: StartsWith
Functions.Description: Test whether this string starts with given string.

Params.Name: SearchCase
Params.Description: Indicates whether the search is case sensitive or not ( defaults to ESearchCase::IgnoreCase )

Return.Description: true if this string begins with specified text, false otherwise

Functions.Name: EndsWith
Functions.Description: Test whether this string ends with given string.

Params.Name: SearchCase
Params.Description: Indicates whether the search is case sensitive or not ( defaults to ESearchCase::IgnoreCase )

Return.Description: true if this string ends with specified text, false otherwise

Functions.Name: MatchesWildcard
Functions.Description: Searches this string for a given wild card

Params.Name: Wildcard
Params.Description: ?-type wildcard

Params.Name: SearchCase
Params.Description: Indicates whether the search is case sensitive or not ( defaults to ESearchCase::IgnoreCase )

Return.Description: true if this string matches the ?-type wildcard given.

Functions.Name: Trim
Functions.Description: Removes whitespace characters from the front of this string.

Functions.Name: TrimTrailing
Functions.Description: Removes trailing whitespace characters

Functions.Name: CullArray
Functions.Description: Takes an array of strings and removes any zero length entries.

Params.Name: InArray
Params.Description: The array to cull

Return.Description: The number of elements left in InArray

Functions.Name: Reverse
Functions.Description: Returns a copy of this string, with the characters in reverse order

Functions.Name: Replace
Functions.Description: Replace all occurrences of a substring in this string

Params.Name: From
Params.Description: substring to replace

Params.Name: To
Params.Description: substring to replace From with

Params.Name: SearchCase
Params.Description: Indicates whether the search is case sensitive or not ( defaults to ESearchCase::IgnoreCase )

Return.Description: a copy of this string with the replacement made

Functions.Name: ReplaceInline
Functions.Description: Replace all occurrences of SearchText with ReplacementText in this string.

Params.Name: SearchText
Params.Description: the text that should be removed from this string

Params.Name: ReplacementText
Params.Description: the text to insert in its place

Params.Name: SearchCase
Params.Description: Indicates whether the search is case sensitive or not ( defaults to ESearchCase::IgnoreCase )

Return.Description: the number of occurrences of SearchText that were replaced.

Functions.Name: Split
Functions.Description: Splits this string at given string position case sensitive.

Params.Name: InStr
Params.Description: The string to search and split at

Params.Name: LeftS
Params.Description: out the string to the left of InStr, not updated if return is false

Params.Name: RightS
Params.Description: out the string to the right of InStr, not updated if return is false

Params.Name: SearchCase
Params.Description: Indicates whether the search is case sensitive or not ( defaults to ESearchCase::IgnoreCase )

Params.Name: SearchDir
Params.Description: Indicates whether the search starts at the begining or at the end ( defaults to ESearchDir::FromStart )

Return.Description: true if string is split, otherwise false
the left most given number of characters
the left most characters from the string chopping the given number of characters from the end
the string to the right of the specified location, counting back from the right (end of the word).
the string to the right of the specified location, counting forward from the left (from the beginning of the word).
the substring from Start position for Count characters.

Functions.Name: TimeSecondsToString
Functions.Description: Convert a number of seconds into minutes:seconds.milliseconds format string

Functions.Name: TimeSecondsToStringSec
Functions.Description: Convert a number of seconds into minutes:seconds
